author: dns-impl
content: Plan: (1) Verify AC-1 satisfied by merge of dns_instrument_fix — onHeadersReceived and onHeadersReceivedListener confirmed in dns-instrument.ts. (2) Fix TODO on ip?: string in browser-web-request-event-details.ts with proper MDN-based comment (AC-2). (3) Add test_redirect_chain_dns using MAGIC_REDIRECT 2-hop chain, assert len==3 (AC-3). (4) Build extension and run tests to verify AC-4 and AC-5.
